about.title: About BLA Services
about.intro: BLA Services is a service marketplace built for a simple, trustworthy and secure experience, even on low connectivity. We connect clients to verified providers.
about.mission_text: Digitize everyday services in West Africa with a mobile-first, robust and credible platform that protects users and empowers reliable providers.
about.values_1: Guided, simple and fast user experience.
about.values_3: Transparency on prices, quality and service status.
about.values_4: Continuous improvement powered by data and AI.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Key answers for both clients and providers.

q1.question: How do I create a BLA Services account?
q1.answer: Click "Sign up", choose your role, enter first name, last name, email and phone, then validate the OTP code.

q2.question: Are phone and email mandatory?
q2.answer: Yes. Both are required to improve account security, recovery and communication reliability.

q3.question: How do I find a provider near me?
q3.answer: Use the Services page, enable your location and filter by rating, price, availability and category.

q4.question: Can I contact a provider before booking?
q4.answer: From the provider profile, you can review details, ratings and launch a detailed booking request.

q5.question: Which payment methods are available?
q5.answer: The platform supports Mobile Money, bank card and internal wallet depending on your market.

q6.question: What if I have a dispute?
q6.answer: Report the issue from your account. Admin follows each case with traceability and evidence.

q7.question: How do I become a provider?
q7.answer: Register as provider, complete your profile, publish your services, then pass identity verification.

q8.question: How is personal data handled?
q8.answer: Data is protected, logged and processed under strict privacy and security controls.

q9.question: Does the site work with low connectivity?
q9.answer: Yes. The interface is mobile-first with progressive loading and network fallback messaging.

q10.question: How can I contact support?
q10.answer: Use the Contact form. You receive an automatic email, then admin status updates until closure.

legal_notice.title: Legal notice
legal_notice.editor_text: BLA Services. Publication manager: Jean Yves Kpangban, Data Engineer / Analytics. Contact: support@bla-app.com.
legal_notice.hosting_text: The application is hosted on cloud infrastructure with continuous monitoring, logging and security controls.
legal_notice.ip_text: Platform content, brand assets and text are protected. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
legal_notice.liability_text: BLA Services applies reasonable efforts to ensure service availability, reliability and security.

collect.title: 1. Collected data
collect.text: We collect data required to run the service: identity, contact details, activity history, payments and support interactions.

usage.title: 2. Purposes
usage.text: Data is used to secure accounts, match clients and providers, process bookings, improve quality and prevent fraud.

legal_basis.title: 3. Legal basis
legal_basis.text: Processing relies on service execution, legal obligations and legitimate interests related to security and product improvement.

retention.title: 4. Retention period
retention.text: Data is retained as long as needed for service operations, then archived or deleted per applicable requirements.

sharing.title: 5. Data sharing
sharing.text: Data is shared only with required technical processors (hosting, payment, notifications), under strict contractual safeguards.

security.title: 6. Security
security.text: We apply encryption, access control, logging and anti-abuse protections to secure users.

rights.title: 7. Your rights
rights.text: You can request access, correction, objection or deletion of your data under applicable regulations.

contact.title: 8. Privacy contact
contact.text: For any personal data request, use the platform Contact form.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.text: These terms govern access and use of BLA Services by clients and providers.

account.title: 2. User account
account.text: Each user is responsible for the accuracy of submitted information and account credential confidentiality.

booking.title: 3. Bookings
booking.text: Bookings become binding once confirmed. Status tracking is provided throughout service execution.

payment.title: 4. Payments
payment.text: Payments are processed through secure channels. Fees may apply depending on method and market.

ratings.title: 5. Ratings and reviews
ratings.text: Reviews must remain honest, respectful and factual. Abusive content can be moderated.

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.text: BLA Services operates as a technology intermediary and enforces security, verification and dispute-resolution workflows.

termination.title: 7. Suspension / account closure
termination.text: In case of fraud, abuse or policy violations, the platform may suspend or terminate an account.

law.title: 8. Applicable law
law.text: These terms are governed by applicable law in the service operating country, subject to local mandatory provisions.
